Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heart of Twin Stars]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 4''' — Heart of Twin Stars is a technique that requires no specific aspect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 5''' — Heart of Twin Stars is a book or manual that Kelsa studies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Heart of Twin Stars manual contains a note about canceling out the aspects of madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is a cycling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Heart of Twin Stars is described as sounding like a classic Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Heart of Twin Stars manual is only halfway complete with the rest of the pages being blank.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — The Heart of Twin Stars was originally a technique manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is a manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon changed his breathing technique according to the Heart of Twin Stars manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Heart of Twin Stars was originally a sheaf of yellow papers that became Lindon's personal Path manual.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon possesses a Heart of Twin Stars manual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart of Twin Stars has no practical use in battle.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is a spirit Enforcer technique designed to split one core into two.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is a technique that can separate part of the soul from itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon is using a modified Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Little Blue can empower the Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon cycled the Heart of Twin Stars while draining power from the priest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is inside Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon uses the Heart of Twin Stars to sort energy.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is something Lindon can cycle.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — The Heart of Twin Stars is a spiritual Enforcer technique used for cycling madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon made a purified soul Enforcer binding to simulate the Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon possesses and can cycle the power of the Heart of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart of Twin Stars can purify madra.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Heart of Twin Stars divided the spiritual river drained from Northstrider into many colored streams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart of Twin Stars allows Lindon to filter powers stolen from Northstrider.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
